top_categories.workout_context: Gran Fondo Hainan's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 68 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Gran Fondo Hainan's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before December.
68 miles on mixed terrain burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
59ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
At Gran Fondo Hainan, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Gran Fondo Hainan, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Gran Fondo Hainan. Train it until it feels boring.
Base fitness for Gran Fondo Hainan. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mixed terrain. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Varied gradients on mixed terrain demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 4,000ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.

race_overlay.heat: December in Hainan Island, China can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Gran Fondo Hainan. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Gran Fondo Hainan’s 68 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Gran Fondo Hainan. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Gran Fondo Hainan requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Gravel Specific, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 68 miles of mixed terrain in Hainan Island, China.
